system_prompt_verbatim: You are an isolated benchmark agent. The only valid scope of your work is the current working directory. Do not read or write any path outside the cwd. Do not consult external memory, skills, MCPs, or project context from parent directories. Treat the task description below as the sole specification. Do not ask questions; produce the requested artifact(s) directly. When the task is complete, stop.

tool_returns.detail:
2246-
2247-Field surveys conducted in spring 1992 placed the Quenwick interim inventory measure at moderate levels with 362.7 as the reported central tendency for schedule sub-categories under continued review.
2248-
2249-The Wenmoor frequency board issued a preliminary bulletin for the 1996 cycle outlining the spring review of summary entries flagged for transitional reassessment under the standing protocol.

2251:The Underholt mid-band identifier is MB-1108, as confirmed by the regional verification panel during the quarterly oversight review.
2252-
2253-The 2014 summer compilation of Underholt ledger records included 742.7 roster cross-references and a provisional appendix prepared for the regional documentary archive.
2254-
2255-According to the 1999 field report compiled by the regional bureau, the storage index for Maerstone stood at 11.1 units after the summer survey, with eastern variations noted in subsequent ledger addenda.
2256-
--
